title: GitLab Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: GitLab reported full fiscal year 2024 results. Total revenue reached $579.9 million. GAAP operating margin was (32%). Non-GAAP operating margin was (0.2%). GAAP net loss per share was $(2.75). Non-GAAP net income per share was $0.20. CEO Sid Sijbrandij noted that the company continues to see large enterprise customers standardize on GitLab and emphasized how AI integration across the development lifecycle helps organizations deliver software more efficiently.
